title: Software Issues
drDigitalIntro: Software problems: an app won't open (try restarting, check for updates), an app crashes when you do something specific (try a different approach or update), a file won't open (check if the app is installed, try a different app). Restart your Mac first. Update all apps and macOS. Clear cache in System Preferences > General > Storage. If an app keeps crashing, delete and reinstall it.
drDigitalHint: Most software problems go away with a restart or update.
